executiveSummary: 本次情報以規則引擎整理公開來源，最高優先序主題為 SEMI EXPORT CONTROL、TSMC CAPEX、TSMC CAPEX。所有內容僅供研究與教育用途，不構成個人化投資建議。 本次有 6 個來源或本機 AI 警訊，已寫入 /doctor。

events.title: AI’s Next Power Challenge Is Inside the Delivery Path

sources.title: Semiconductor news source temporarily unavailable
sources.summary: Reuters technology feed could not be parsed. Keep monitoring chip demand, export controls, and supplier commentary through primary filings. This fallback exists so the workflow can produce diagnostics instead of failing silently.

sources.title: SK hynix Ships Samples of 12-Layer Next-Gen ‘HBM4E’
sources.summary: SK hynix Inc. announced today that it has shipped samples of HBM4E, a next-generation DRAM for AI, to major customers. The post SK hynix Ships Samples of 12-Layer Next-Gen ‘HBM4E’ appeared first on Semiconductor Digest .

sources.title: Brewer Science to Acquire Semiconductor Chemical Business Line from Heraeus Epurio
sources.summary: Brewer Science, Inc. today announced it has entered into an agreement to acquire the semiconductor chemicals business line of Heraeus Epurio, a recognized technology leader in ultrapure electronic chemicals used in semiconductor manufacturing. The post Brewer Science to Acquire Semiconductor Chemical Business Line from Heraeus Epurio appeared first on Semiconductor Digest .

sources.title: Intel Announces Leadership Appointment at Intel Foundry to Accelerate Development and Manufacturing
sources.summary: Intel Corporation today announced the appointment of Seok-Hee Lee as executive vice president of Intel Foundry, reporting directly to CEO Lip-Bu Tan. The post Intel Announces Leadership Appointment at Intel Foundry to Accelerate Development and Manufacturing appeared first on Semiconductor Digest .

sources.title: NHanced Semiconductors President Robert Patti to Deliver Plenary Presentation at the 2026 Lithography Workshop
sources.summary: Patti will describe how advanced packaging technology is now the enabling factor for a renaissance in leading edge semiconductor design and manufacturing. The post NHanced Semiconductors President Robert Patti to Deliver Plenary Presentation at the 2026 Lithography Workshop appeared first on Semiconductor Digest .

sources.title: AI’s Next Power Challenge Is Inside the Delivery Path
sources.summary: As AI workloads scale rapidly, power delivery is emerging as a critical bottleneck, with inefficiencies in the path from grid to transistor demanding new approaches to on-chip and near-chip power conversion. The post AI’s Next Power Challenge Is Inside the Delivery Path appeared first on Semiconductor Digest .

sources.title: The ‘ingenious strategy’ behind most truckers’ least favorite week of the year: International Roadcheck
sources.summary: Inspection blitzes frustrate truck drivers. But economists found that the International Roadcheck Week boosts overall road safety. The post The ‘ingenious strategy’ behind most truckers’ least favorite week of the year: International Roadcheck appeared first on FreightWaves .

sources.title: Why the Northeast is quietly running out of diesel
sources.summary: Diesel inventories on the East Coast are at record lows. Truckers are spooked by the vanishing stocks and soaring rates. The post Why the Northeast is quietly running out of diesel appeared first on FreightWaves .

sources.title: Exclusive: Central Freight Lines to shut down after 96 years
sources.summary: A source familiar with the 96-year-old company said he is unsure whether CFL will file Chapter 7 or “liquidate outside of bankruptcy,” but that the LTL carrier has no plans to reorganize. The post Exclusive: Central Freight Lines to shut down after 96 years appeared first on FreightWaves .
